entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being studied for seedling emergence and survival under high soil surface temperatures

entities.name: HIGH SOIL SURFACE TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The environmental stressor used to screen genotypes for emergence and survival

entities.name: EMERGENCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet seedlings to emerge from the soil

entities.name: SURVIVAL
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet seedlings to survive after emergence

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A field-based method to screen genotypes for emergence and survival at high soil surface temperatures

entities.name: THERMOTOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a genotype to tolerate high temperatures, defined by a specific index

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE DEFICIT
entities.description: A condition of low soil moisture that may interact with high temperature to affect seedlings

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which the thermotolerance trait is genetically transmitted

relationships.description: may interact with temperature to affect
